description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and clean, geometric lines. The exterior is primarily white with contrasting dark gray sections, and it features large windows that allow for ample natural light. There are multiple balconies and terraces, including a spacious rooftop deck with minimalistic railings. The front of the house is landscaped with decorative trees and has a driveway with two parked cars. The main entryway is slightly recessed and accessible via a small set of steps, flanked by potted plants. The overall design emphasizes open outdoor spaces and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor living areas.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, multiple balconies, and landscaped front yard with driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, driveway with two cars, landscaped yard, and prominent balconies.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, minimal window arrangement, and rear terrace with a parked car.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the rooftop deck, upper balcony, and large windows on both floors.
description_view_3: Side view with visible pergola, side entry, and additional landscaping elements.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with steps, minimalistic door, potted plants, and no overhang
